title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Phoenix Ventures Group Ltd
body: "Application number 5364  Applicant Phoenix Group Management Services Limited objected to the name used by Phoenix Ventures Group Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 24 December 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of PHOENIX VENTURES GROUP LTD is changed to SC830954 LTD. "
